(sha=bb67ad547df86b18b508bb72ce3b603c4b56b37d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a plugin-state-backed durable inbound receive journal, exposes it through the channel-message SDK, and rewires WhatsApp inbound handling to persist pending/completed deliveries and delay read receipts.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main marks WhatsApp messages read before the handler path and only has in-memory dedupe finalization. I did not run a live WhatsApp reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer label, missing real behavior proof, and public SDK/data-at-rest decisions make this a human review path rather than an automated repair.

target.title: fix(whatsapp): persist inbound delivery in plugin state
target.body:
## Summary

- add a generic `createDurableInboundReceiveJournal` helper on the channel-message SDK surface backed by plugin keyed state
- wire WhatsApp inbound delivery through plugin-state pending/completed journals instead of a plugin-local JSON disk cache
- delay WhatsApp read receipts until handler completion, release durable state on retryable failures, and fall back to live delivery if persistence rejects an oversized payload
- cover journal races and WhatsApp read/retry/fallback behavior

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/durable-receive.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/monitor-inbox.behavior.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`
- `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=0 pnpm check:changed`
- `autoreview --mode local --base origin/main --no-web-search`: clean after fixups
- `pnpm check:changed` via Testbox attempted first, but remote image failed before repo checks: missing `/usr/local/global/v11/f89-19e513f609a/node_modules/pnpm/bin/pnpm.mjs`

Behavior addressed: WhatsApp inbound messages are persisted through plugin state before handler dispatch, and read receipts are sent only after successful handler completion.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout with Node/pnpm repo tooling; Testbox remote attempted but failed before checks due image pnpm path issue.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/message/durable-receive.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/monitor-inbox.behavior.test.ts`; `pnpm build`; `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=0 pnpm check:changed`; local autoreview.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed 65/65; build passed plugin SDK export checks; local changed gate passed typecheck/lint/runtime guard lanes; autoreview reported no actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Retryable WhatsApp handler failures keep inbound messages pending without sending read receipts; completed or duplicate deliveries do not replay; persistence rejection falls back to live delivery instead of dropping the message.
What was not tested: Live WhatsApp device roundtrip; remote Testbox gate was blocked by the pnpm image issue noted above.

Refs #85257.
target.author: steipete
